{{Infobox character
| name = Eight
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Eight]] is a pale man with short hair who carries a broad shield.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Eight]] is a grim man who carries a shield strapped to his back.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Eight]] carried [[Nine]] inside the cabin.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Eight]] is one of [[Urzaia]]'s brother [[Champions]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
